messages.content:
=Analyze the following Reddit posts and choose EXACTLY ONE, the most suitable for a high-quality technical article or product review.
IMPORTANT: Everything must be processed and returned in ENGLISH.

Respond ONLY in JSON with this format:
{ 
  "decision": "NEW_ARTICLE" | "NEW_REVIEW" | "NONE", 
  "title": "SEO Title in English", 
  "excerpt": "Summary in English", 
  "slug": "url-slug-in-english", 
  "category": "Articles" | "Reviews",
  "reddit_id": "CHOSEN_REDDIT_ID" 
}

Content:
{{ $json.posts.map(p => "[" + p.id + "] " + p.title + " - " + p.text).join('\n---') }}

parameters.prompt: =Generate a hyper-realistic, professional photograph for a technical van life/RV and solar energy blog. Subject: {{ JSON.parse($node['Decision GPT'].json.message.content.replace(/```json|```/gi, '')).title }}. CRITICAL: The image must NOT contain any text, words, letters, signatures, or watermarks. Focus only on the visual hardware or lifestyle scene.

messages.content:
=Write a comprehensive, technical article in PERFECT ENGLISH of approximately 1500 words. 
STYLE REQUIREMENTS:
1. Use numbered H2 and H3 headings (e.g., 1. Introduction, 2. Technical Specs).
2. Use <b> or <strong> tags for all technical specifications and key metrics.
3. Include at least one HTML <table> for technical comparisons or data breakdown.
4. Tone: Authoritative, data-driven, and highly practical for DIY off-grid enthusiasts.
5. Formatting: Use clean HTML (h2, h3, p, ul, table). No <html> or <body> tags.

Title: {{ JSON.parse($node['Decision GPT'].json.message.content.replace(/```json|```/gi, '')).title }}
Context: {{ JSON.parse($node['Decision GPT'].json.message.content.replace(/```json|```/gi, '')).excerpt }}
6. STYLE RULE: NEVER use em-dashes (—). Instead, use commas for natural flow or parentheses for technical asides to ensure a human-like tone.

=Write an objective, data-rich product review in PERFECT ENGLISH of approximately 1500 words.
STYLE REQUIREMENTS:
1. Use numbered H2 and H3 headings.
2. Include a detailed comparison <table> using standard HTML tags.
3. Bold all technical values and units (e.g., **200Ah**, **12V**, **MPPT**).
4. Include a 'Pros & Cons' bulleted list.
5. Tone: Technical expert reviewing hardware for vanlife/solar utility.

Title: {{ JSON.parse($node['Decision GPT'].json.message.content.replace(/```json|```/gi, '')).title }}
Context: {{ JSON.parse($node['Decision GPT'].json.message.content.replace(/```json|```/gi, '')).excerpt }}
6. STYLE RULE: NEVER use em-dashes (—). Instead, use commas for natural flow or parentheses for technical asides to ensure a human-like tone.

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚀 [AI READY] Approval Needed: ' + JSON.parse($node['Decision GPT'].json.message.content.replace(/```json|```/gi, '')).title }}
parameters.html:
={{ "

🚐 SolarRV AI Publisher

New AI content ready

" + $json.title + "

" + $json.excerpt + "

✅ APPROVE & PUBLISH❌ DISCARD

Generated by SolarRV Engine v3 AI.

" }}
